title: EQT AB (publ) Year-end Report 2025
relevant_snippets: Gross inflows to Key funds amounted to в‚¬17bn EQT Infrastructure VI closed at в‚¬21.5bn in total commitments, including в‚¬21.3bn in fee-generating assets under management, exceeding its в‚¬20bn target and hitting hard cap BPEA Private Equity Fund IX was activated on 1 March 2025. As of 22 January 2026, it has received commitments of approximately $14bn. EQT expects to have secured commitments corresponding to the $14.5bn hard cap in the first quarter of 2026 EQT set the hard cap for EQT XI at в‚¬24bn. Fundraising is progressing well, underpinned by strong exit activity in Private Capital Europe & North America. The fund is expected to be activated mid-2026

Total Revenue amounted to в‚¬вЂЊвЂЊвЂЊ2,632вЂ‹вЂЊm (в‚¬вЂЊвЂЊвЂ‹2,653вЂ‹вЂЊm), a decrease of 1% Fee-related revenue amounted to в‚¬вЂЊвЂЊ2,283вЂ‹вЂЊm (в‚¬вЂЊ2,104вЂ‹вЂЊm), driven by new closed out commitments Carried interest and Investment income decreased to в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊвЂЊвЂЊвЂЊ349вЂ‹вЂЊm (в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊвЂЊвЂЊвЂ‹549вЂ‹вЂЊm), reflecting a slightly lower net change in fair value compared to 2024

Total Revenue amounted to в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹2,732вЂ‹вЂЊm (в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊ2,355вЂ‹вЂЊm), an increase of вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹16%вЂ‹вЂЊ Fee-related revenue grew by вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊ9%вЂ‹вЂЊ to в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂ‹2,283вЂ‹вЂЊm (в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊ2,104вЂ‹вЂЊm), driven by new closed out commitments Carried interest and Investment income increased to в‚¬вЂЊ448вЂ‹вЂЊm (в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊвЂЊ251вЂ‹вЂЊm), primarily driven by EQT VIII, BPEA VII and BPEA VI
EBITDA amounted to в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊ1,642вЂ‹вЂЊm (в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂ‹1,359вЂ‹вЂЊm), corresponding to an EBITDA margin of вЂЊвЂЊ60%вЂ‹вЂЊ (вЂЊ58%вЂ‹вЂЊ)

Fee-related EBITDA amounted to в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊвЂЊвЂЊ1,194вЂ‹вЂЊm (в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊвЂЊвЂ‹1,108вЂ‹вЂЊm), corresponding to a Fee-related EBITDA margin of вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊвЂ‹вЂЊ52%вЂ‹вЂЊ (вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹53%вЂ‹вЂЊ)

EBITDA amounted to в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊвЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹1,382вЂ‹вЂЊm (в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊвЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊ1,324вЂ‹вЂЊm), corresponding to an EBITDA margin of вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊвЂ‹вЂЊвЂ‹52%вЂ‹вЂЊ (вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊ50%вЂ‹вЂЊ)

Interest bearing liabilities amounted to в‚¬2,427m (в‚¬2,000m) 5 EQT raised an inaugural USD bond with a nominal amount of $500m (equivalent to в‚¬427m), maturing in 2035. EQTвЂ™s revolving credit facility of в‚¬1.5bn remained undrawn
EQT raised an inaugural USD bond with a nominal amount of $500m (equivalent to в‚¬427m), maturing in 2035. EQTвЂ™s revolving credit facility of в‚¬1.5bn remained undrawn
EQT signed an agreement to acquire Coller Capital (22 January 2026) вЂ“ a leading global secondaries firm with fee-generating AUM of в‚¬28bn 2

Gross inflows amounted to в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹26вЂ‹вЂЊbn вЂ“ more than double the в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊ11вЂ‹вЂЊbn of inflows in 2024. FAUM increased to в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹141вЂ‹вЂЊbn (в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂЊ136вЂ‹вЂЊbn). Total AUM was в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊвЂ‹270вЂ‹вЂЊbn (в‚¬вЂЊвЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂЊ269вЂ‹вЂЊbn) at the end of the period
